texto: Understanding Scripture in a language other than the heart language in which we think and experience emotion is "like trying to eat soup with a fork. You can get a little taste, but you cannot get nourished.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a William Cameron Townsend: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de limites e escolhas conscientes. O trecho “Understanding Scripture in a language other than the heart language in which we think and experie…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, bible, language pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de reflexao.
